## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What is missing or painful today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen. If it touches a specific area, note which:
the hook pipeline, a channel (CLI / Telegram / Feishu), tools, skills, or tapes.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other approaches you have thought about.

## Additional context

Anything else — examples, links, or references.
